name: Advance America
description_short: Brownsburg, IN Advance America storefront at 124 E Northfield Dr J offers quick payday and title loans with flexible terms.
description_long:
Advance America is located at 124 E Northfield Dr J in Brownsburg, IN, set up as a standalone storefront for convenient access. This Brownsburg branch is open Monday 10 AM–5 PM, Wednesday 10 AM–6 PM, Thursday 10 AM–5 PM, Friday 10 AM–6 PM, and Saturday 10 AM–2 PM; closed Tuesdays and Sundays. The straightforward storefront layout makes it easy to walk in when you need urgent cash.

This Brownsburg Advance America location provides payday loans, title loans, and other short-term financing for residents facing cash shortages. For questions or to start an application at the Brownsburg store, call +1 317-858-7609 during business hours. The team here can explain your options and detail what you'll need to bring to complete your application.

Brownsburg residents who need quick access to cash can rely on this Advance America storefront for rapid approval and same-day or next-day funding. Have a valid government ID, proof of current income (pay stub or bank statement), and an active checking account ready when you visit. Advance America specializes in fast credit solutions for those dealing with unexpected expenses.
address: 124 E Northfield Dr J, Brownsburg, IN 46112

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee policy identified. Loan fees are governed by state regulations.

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: Vehicle must be paid off or nearly paid off

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Borrow, repay, and reborrow as needed

pros: One of the largest payday lenders in the US with 800+ physical stores in 27 states
28+ years in operation and over 157 million loans funded
In-store cash disbursement in approximately 30 minutes for approved loans
Fully online application and account management portal available
Trustpilot rating of 4.9/5 and Google rating of 5.0/5 indicate high transactional customer satisfaction
BBB A+ rating with accreditation granted in 2024
Offers multiple loan products (payday, installment, title, line of credit) under one provider
cons: Payday loan APRs range from 350%–700%, among the highest borrowing costs available to consumers
BBB customer review score is only 1.7/5 from 154 reviews, with 302 complaints filed in three years
Product availability and loan terms vary significantly by state — not all products offered everywhere
Title loans put the borrower's vehicle at risk of repossession
Not a substitute for longer-term credit needs — designed for short-term emergencies only
best_for: Working- or middle-income individuals facing a genuine short-term cash emergency before their next paycheck
Borrowers who need fast in-store cash access and live near one of 800+ Advance America locations
People who lack access to traditional bank loans or credit cards and need funds within 24 hours
Consumers in states with payday lending regulations who want a licensed, established provider
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for borrowers facing a one-time, low-dollar cash emergency who have exhausted lower-cost options such as bank overdraft protection, credit cards, or family loans. The main caveat is significant: APRs of 350%–700% on payday products make this one of the most expensive forms of credit available, and repeated borrowing can accelerate financial hardship rather than resolve it.
services: Online loan applications via digital portal
Online account management and payment processing

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Brownsburg, IN Advance America payday & title loans at 124 E Northfield Dr J. Same-day funding available.
